economic_notes: Retail enterprises operate video lottery terminals, bingo hall, convenience stores and gas bars. Kespuwick Resources manages Fisheries operations. Band entered fuel supply agreement with Sobeys Atlantic Fuel Co. operating as Shell in December 2017.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 8 enterprises: Your Winner's World-AFN Ltd., Medway Entertainment-AFN, The Gold Nugget-AFN Ltd., Kespuwick Fisheries Incorporated, AFN Entertainment Centre/Winner's Corner-AFN, Hammonds Plains Entertainment AFN, and 3321702 NS Ltd. Trust Funds are NOT consolidated - equity in Trust Funds was $nil at March 31, 2020 (wound up subsequent to year end). Sales tax assessment liability of $1,736,438 on balance sheet. ISC funding estimated from receivables note as Department of Indigenous Services Canada. Restricted cash includes Funds on deposit at DISC $11,576, Funds on deposit at FNFA $756,788, CMHC reserves $181,374. Long-term debt increased significantly from $4,978,342 to $19,903,517 likely due to new financing for capital assets ($9,092,302 additions). Annual debt service figure of $14,925,175 represents repayment of long-term debt net of advances per cash flow statement.
